content: Remote OK Outbound Sales Development Representative Latin America Bluelight Consulting <p>Bluelight is a leading software consultancy dedicated to designing and developing innovative technology that enhances users' lives. With a steadfast commitment to delivering exceptional service to our clients, Bluelight excels in its focus on quality and customer satisfaction. Our mission is not only to create cutting-edge applications but also to foster a collaborative and enriching work environment where each team member can grow and thrive. With a presence across the United States and Central/South America, Bluelight is in an exciting phase of expansion, continually seeking exceptional talent to join its dynamic and diverse community.</p><p><br></p><p>We are looking for a skilled individual to join our rapidly growing team at Bluelight. This position is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment where everyone's opinions and efforts are valued and appreciated. You will have the opportunity to contribute to challenging and meaningful projects, developing high-quality applications that stand out in the market. We value continuous learning, personal growth, and hard work, offering a collaborative environment that promotes professional development. If you are passionate about software development and eager to be part of a growing software consultancy, we invite you to apply and join us on this exciting journey.</p>\n<p></p><p><br></p><b>What we are looking for</b><ul><li>2+ years of experience as a Sales Development Representative, preferably in the SaaS industry, with a track record of achieving quotas and exceeding lead targets.</li><li>Hunter's mentality â expert at identifying and prospecting new accounts through cold calls, email, and social media.</li><li>Strong understanding of SaaS-based products and the sales process.</li><li>Resilient and capable of failing forward; self-motivated with a strong sense of initiative.</li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills via phone and email.</li><li>Proficiency with HubSpot or other CRM software; experience with AI tools to streamline workflows is a plus.</li><li>Proven, creative problem-solving approach and strong analytical skills.</li><li>Passionate about technology that supports and enhances the operations of first responders.</li><li>Experience as a first responder is a plus.</li><li>Bachelor's degree (or equivalent) or at least 2 years of relevant work experience.</li></ul><p><br></p><b>What you will be doing</b><ul><li>Proactively generate new sales leads and opportunities by utilizing HubSpot, cold calls, email, and social media.</li><li>Identify the needs of prospects and suggest appropriate products or services, quickly becoming an expert on our ideal customer profile.</li><li>Build and nurture relationships with prospects and key decision-makers to qualify leads as sales opportunities.</li><li>Set up meetings and calls between prospective customers and our sales executives.</li><li>Work closely with the Marketing team on outbound warm calling to generate MQAs for ABM and other programs.</li><li>Drive attendance for webinars and set meetings for conferences and tradeshows.</li><li>Maintain accurate and detailed records of all prospect interactions in our CRM system.</li><li>Leverage AI tools to streamline workflows, improve processes, and drive data-driven decisions.</li><li>Report weekly, monthly, and quarterly results to the SDR Manager.</li></ul><p><br></p><b>Company Benefits</b><ul><li>Competitive salary and bonuses, including performance-based salary increases.</li><li>Generous paid-time-off policy</li><li>Flexible working hours</li><li>Work remotely</li><li>Continuing education, training, conferences</li><li>Company-sponsored coursework, exams, and certifications</li></ul><p><br></p><p></p>\n<p>Being a consultant in our team is a fun, challenging, and rewarding career choice. Your contributions are highly valued by clients, and the work you do often has a direct and significant impact on their business.</p><p>You will have the opportunity to work on a variety of projects for our incredible clients, which will accelerate your career growth. Youâll collaborate with modern technologies and work alongside some of the best professionals in the industry!</p><p>If youâre eager to be part of an exciting, challenging, and rapidly growing consultancy, we encourage you to apply. #LI-Remote</p> consulting, saas, consultant Antigua Guatemala, Guatemala 2026-05-23T06:00:03+00:00 1131843 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-outbound-sales-development-representative-latin-america-bluelight-consulting-1131843 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Gateway Agent DHL Express <strong><em>Warehouse &amp; Gateway<br><br><br></em></strong><ul><li>Receipt of material from Couriers, resellers and Point of Sale (POS) to go out to the network.</li><li>Transport of this material between the service center and the airport.</li><li>Receipt of material upon the arrival at the airport </li><li>The loading and off-loading of all outbound material on the international flight. This includes all necessary scans and alerts.</li><li>The release and transport of outbound and inbound material out of the customs bond to the service center.</li><li>The release and transport of relevant WPX out of the courier bond to the service center.</li><li>Completing recovery reports</li><li>Managing flight alerts</li><li>100% security scan of all outbound shipments, and storing of paperwork.</li><li>Correct storing of all manifest</li><li>Proper management and contact for all shipments to and from surrounding island via commercial uplift.</li><li>COA/BOS report control</li><li>AQCC monitoring</li><li>X-Ray Scanning<br><br><br></li></ul><strong>Key Qualifications:<br><br></strong>High School Diploma or Equivalent (GED)<br><br>Valid Driverâs License (Truck license)<br><br>Police background clearance check and airport security vetting<br><br>Must be 21 years old<br><br>Excellent customer service skills<br><br>Map reading and GPS skills and knowledge of delivery area preferred<br><br>Previous professional driving experience, preferably in a delivery role<br><br><strong>Physical Requirements:<br><br></strong>Must be able to lift up to seventy (70) lbs occasionally<br><br>Must be able to lift forty (40) lbs frequently<br><br>Must be able to walk, climb stairs, reach overhead, squat, bend, kneel, stoop and crouch repeatedly training, supervisor, code Hamilton, 2026-05-23T04:29:15+00:00 1132020 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-gateway-agent-dhl-express-1132020 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Operations Agent DHL Express <strong><em>Warehouse &amp; Gateway<br><br><br></em></strong><ul><li>Receipt of material from Couriers, resellers and Point of Sale (POS) to go out to the network.</li><li>Transport of this material between the service center and the airport.</li>&lt
